items.title: Tyrone Township Residents Demand Answers on Secret Data Center Talks with Officials
items.dek: A local resident grilled township leaders at a recent meeting over possible nondisclosure agreements signed with developers, highlighting ongoing transparency worries even as a temporary moratorium remains in place.
items.judge_note: Incremental transparency angle in Tyrone Township; real resident confrontation but lacks a specific decision or filing.

items.title: OpenAI-Oracle Data Center to Draw 1.4 Gigawatts in Saline Township
items.dek: The 1-gigawatt AI campus on 250 acres will create 450 onsite jobs and receive sales-tax relief plus a 12-year local abatement; DTE is separately negotiating another 3 gigawatts of data-center load in Michigan.
items.judge_note: Major new project confirmation: 1.4 GW OpenAI-Oracle campus with specific job numbers, acreage, and tax abatement details — concrete development.

items.title: Saline Township continues data center meetings on groundwater and site monitoring
items.dek: After a consent judgment allowing the project, township leaders schedule repeated advisory sessions to review water well data and related plans.
items.judge_note: Incremental follow-up on Saline with scheduled advisory sessions and monitoring—real next step after the consent judgment, not a duplicate of the tax break stor
